channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Wednesday, April 29, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your attention today, Midya. The Bank of Canada holding its rate steady — while signalling deep uncertainty about what comes next — is the single most important data point for your real estate tracking and for any BC client conversations about budgets and in...
